1. **Staged Changes**: Added all modified website pages (`about.html`, `contact.html`, `css/style.css`, `index.html`, `js/main.js`, `map.html`, `pricing.html`, `services.html`, `testimonials.html`) and newly generated SEO/setup files (`robots.txt`, `sitemap.xml`, `QUICK_WINS_SETUP.md`, `SEO_TEMPLATE.html`).
